data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for subscriber-to-endpoint ownership checks.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the subscriber-to-endpoint ownership checks, but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or validations related to this requirement. While there are multiple passed steps indicating successful operations, none of them specifically address the ownership checks necessary to confirm compliance with the requirement. This leads to a conclusion that the validation is blocked due to a lack of concrete evidence.
gaps: Lack of evidence for subscriber-to-endpoint ownership checks.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify subscriber-to-endpoint ownership checks.
